ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Quartz site's URL, no trailing slash. Example: https://notes.example.com
ast.target: 您的 Quartz 站点的 URL，末尾不要加斜杠。示例：https://notes.example.com

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of characters in the random slug. Higher = harder to guess. 10 ≈ 60 bits of entropy, more than enough for unguessability.
ast.target: 随机 slug 中的字符数。越高 = 越难猜测。10 ≈ 60 位熵，足以保证不可猜测性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy the resulting public URL to the clipboard whenever you publish or rotate a note or folder.
ast.target: 每当您发布或轮换笔记或文件夹时，将生成的公共 URL 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a confirmation dialog before bulk-publishing or bulk-unpublishing a folder.
ast.target: 在批量发布或批量取消发布文件夹之前显示确认对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change these only if you have an existing convention. The server-side stager must use the same key names.
ast.target: 仅在您有现有约定时才更改这些设置。服务器端暂存器必须使用相同的键名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter key that marks a note as published.
ast.target: 标记笔记为已发布的 frontmatter 键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter key that stores the per-note random slug.
ast.target: 存储每个笔记随机 slug 的 frontmatter 键。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: This plugin is the Obsidian-side of a self-hosted publishing pipeline. It edits frontmatter; the server-side stager (running in your VPS) does the actual mirroring. See the project README for the server setup.
ast.target: 此插件是自托管发布流程的 Obsidian 端。它编辑 frontmatter；服务器端暂存器（运行在您的 VPS 中）执行实际的镜像操作。有关服务器设置，请参阅项目 README。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This note has no public URL yet — publish it first.
ast.target: 此笔记尚无公共 URL — 请先发布它。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换活动笔记的发布状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy public URL of active note
ast.target: 复制活动笔记的公共 URL

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rotate public URL of active note
ast.target: 轮换活动笔记的公共 URL
